acceptance: After a fresh setup-from-scratch.sh run on a clean repo, .env contains JWT_PRIVATE_KEY with len>=32 (real random, not 'replace-with-dev-key') AND ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true. Backend startup no longer warns about JWT key length. .env.example documents both.
verification_commands: Clone fresh, run setup-from-scratch.sh, then: (a) grep '^JWT_PRIVATE_KEY=' .env, assert value length >= 32 and is not 'replace-with-dev-key', (b) grep '^ENABLE_VERBOSE_LOGGING=true' .env returns a match, (c) start uvicorn, assert no 'JWT_PRIVATE_KEY too short' warning in startup logs.

tasks.title: make bootstrap_source_of_truth.py --refresh preserve closer-set task status
acceptance: bootstrap_source_of_truth.py --refresh on a registry where a task has status=done + last_outcome=committed leaves those two fields unchanged. A new pytest under .claude/bin/tests/ enforces this for all closer-final statuses. Manual patch of registry.json after refresh is no longer needed.
verification_commands: Set task P01-S02-T001.status=done in registry.json. Run python3 -B -S .claude/bin/bootstrap_source_of_truth.py --refresh. Assert: (a) refresh exits 0, (b) git diff registry.json shows the task's status, last_outcome, last_updated_by, last_stop_at unchanged, (c) the new pytest test_bootstrap_refresh_preserves_done_status passes.
tasks.target: make bootstrap_source_of_truth.py --refresh preserve closer-set task status
tasks.target_raw: make bootstrap_source_of_truth.py --refresh preserve closer-set task status

tasks.title: fix refresh cookie Path mismatch (/auth vs /api/v1/auth) across sign-in setter + refresh/logout consumers
acceptance: Cookie set at sign-in uses a Path attribute that matches the actual endpoint URL prefix so a real browser/curl re-submits the cookie to /api/v1/auth/refresh and /api/v1/auth/logout. T002 sign-in tests, T003 refresh tests, T004 logout tests all pass after the change. New integration test added that simulates a real browser cookie jar (not TestClient) and asserts the cookie roundtrip end-to-end. TECHNICAL_GUIDE §10.2 updated to pin the chosen Path attribute. Cookie Path in _set_refresh_cookie and _clear_refresh_cookie remain byte-identical. Existing T002 sign-in test assertions (test_auth_signin.py lines pinning literal path=/auth) updated to match the new Path attribute
sign_in.py docstring header §F.7 also re-pinned.
verification_commands: Hard reset + sign-in employee.verification@inditex-sandbox.com + curl -c cookies.txt -b cookies.txt logout (NO explicit Cookie header) → 204 No Content + revoke + audit success. Same flow against refresh → 200 + rotation.
tasks.target: fix refresh cookie Path mismatch (/auth vs /api/v1/auth) across sign-in setter + refresh/logout consumers
tasks.target_raw: fix refresh cookie Path mismatch (/auth vs /api/v1/auth) across sign-in setter + refresh/logout consumers

tasks.title: fix dev-restart db_health race: wait for host TCP, not container-internal pg_isready
acceptance: Two consecutive 'bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset' commands both exit 0 and persist users>=1, with no manual sleep between them. wait_for db_health returns only after both container-internal pg_isready AND a real host-side connection (127.0.0.1:5432 with valid credentials) succeed within 60s. If host-side connection fails after 60s the script fails non-zero (no silent fallback).
verification_commands: Run: bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset, echo $?, bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset, both must print 0. psql count(*) FROM users must return >= 1 after each. Negative control: stop postgres container (docker compose stop postgres), run bash scripts/dev-restart.sh --reset → must fail within 60s with a clear 'Postgres did not become ready' message.
tasks.target: fix dev-restart db_health race: wait for host TCP, not container-internal pg_isready
tasks.target_raw: fix dev-restart db_health race: wait for host TCP, not container-internal pg_isready

tasks.title: Backend/infra: configure cross-origin between frontend (:5173) and backend (:8000) — vite proxy or CORSMiddleware
acceptance: From a real browser at http://localhost:5173, a fetch with credentials:'include' to http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/refresh (or to /api/v1/auth/refresh same-origin if the chosen fix is vite proxy) succeeds preflight and reaches the backend handler, returning the documented 200 (with refresh cookie) or 401 AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED envelope. Same for POST /api/v1/auth/sign-in, POST /api/v1/auth/2fa/verify, GET /api/v1/users/me, POST /api/v1/auth/logout. TECHNICAL_GUIDE updated to document the chosen cross-origin strategy (vite proxy vs backend CORS) and STACK_PROFILE/Coverage Registry reflect any new write_set.
verification_commands: Re-run /verify-slice P01-S03-T001 F3-F5 in browser end-to-end with the J100 verification user (employee.verification@inditex-sandbox.com + TOTP from data/verification/auth/mfa_primary.json): sign-in → 2fa/verify → cookie set → reload protected route → AuthProvider.hydrate /refresh + /me → status authenticated → renders children → logout → cookie cleared → reload → redirect to /auth/sign-in?next=… . All without net::ERR_FAILED in DevTools network tab. Confirm OPTIONS preflight succeeds: curl -i -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/refresh -H 'Origin: http://localhost:5173' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' returns 200/204 with Access-Control-Allow-Credentials:true and Access-Control-Allow-Origin echoed back (or proxy-mode: same-origin path returns the actual handler response).
tasks.target: Backend/infra: configure cross-origin between frontend (:5173) and backend (:8000) — vite proxy or CORSMiddleware
tasks.target_raw: Backend/infra: configure cross-origin between frontend (:5173) and backend (:8000) — vite proxy or CORSMiddleware

tasks.title: Rotate ENCRYPTION_KEY in dev .env + seed active AI provider with encrypted credentials
tasks.target: Rotate ENCRYPTION_KEY in dev .env + seed active AI provider with encrypted credentials
acceptance: scripts/gen-dev-secrets.sh rotates ENCRYPTION_KEY if placeholder (Fernet.generate_key() pattern)
data/verification loads at least one ai_providers row with encrypted credential for an active chat model
ENCRYPTION_KEY is valid Fernet key (44 base64-url chars + =)
verification_commands: After rotation: curl POST /api/v1/chat/conversations creates a conv (201)
curl POST /api/v1/chat/conversations/{id}/stream returns text/event-stream with meta->chunk->usage->done SSE events

triage.why_not_debugger: ENCRYPTION_KEY hygiene and AI provider seeding for live env are outside this slice's write_set (backend/app/chat/streaming/**, backend/app/llm_gateway/**, backend/tests/**). The ENCRYPTION_KEY placeholder bug exists since .env was created (P00-S01-T001) and surfaces here because P02-S03-T002 is the first slice to require live encrypted AI provider credentials end-to-end. Pattern parallel to P01-S02-T009 JWT key hygiene but for Fernet key. The debugger cannot fix this: it would require modifying scripts/gen-dev-secrets.sh (not in write_set) and data/verification/admin_ai (not in write_set).

notes: Description: The dev .env still has ENCRYPTION_KEY=replace-with-dev-key (placeholder). The first slice requiring live decrypt_secret() calls is P02-S03-T002 (chat streaming). scripts/gen-dev-secrets.sh only rotates JWT_PRIVATE_KEY; it does not rotate ENCRYPTION_KEY or MFA_ENCRYPTION_KEY. Additionally, at least one ai_providers row with a valid encrypted credential (is_default=true, enabled=true, model_type=chat) must be loaded via data/verification for end-to-end curl verification to pass.

Triage: missing_real_data; why_not_debugger=ENCRYPTION_KEY hygiene and AI provider seeding for live env are outside this slice's write_set (backend/app/chat/streaming/**, backend/app/llm_gateway/**, backend/tests/**). The ENCRYPTION_KEY placeholder bug exists since .env was created (P00-S01-T001) and surfaces here because P02-S03-T002 is the first slice to require live encrypted AI provider credentials end-to-end. Pattern parallel to P01-S02-T009 JWT key hygiene but for Fernet key. The debugger cannot fix this: it would require modifying scripts/gen-dev-secrets.sh (not in write_set) and data/verification/admin_ai (not in write_set).

tasks.endpoint: GET /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers, POST /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers, POST /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers/{id}/sync, PATCH /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/tools/{id}, GET /api/v1/admin/ai/agents, PATCH /api/v1/admin/ai/agents/{id}/tools
tasks.endpoint_raw: GET /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers, POST /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers, POST /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/servers/{id}/sync, PATCH /api/v1/admin/ai/mcp/tools/{id}, GET /api/v1/admin/ai/agents, PATCH /api/v1/admin/ai/agents/{id}/tools
tasks.tables_raw: mcp_servers, mcp_credentials, mcp_tools, mcp_agent_bindings, agents, agent_runs, audit_logs

tasks.title: Audit endpoint and security hardening
acceptance: Audit endpoint returns filtered events
security headers and rate limits active
verification_commands: pytest backend/tests/integration -k audit && curl as auditor

tasks.title: Observability and performance smoke
acceptance: Prometheus metrics exposed
chat stream and model test latency histograms populated
verification_commands: pytest backend/tests -k metrics && curl /metrics

tasks.title: Visual regression and design token gate
acceptance: Screenshots show editorial tokens, hairlines, black CTA and zero rounded cards
VISUAL_CONTRACT_CHECK documents tokens, components, required states, real data/backend and visual evidence
verification_commands: bash scripts/check-design-tokens.sh && visual evidence
tasks.target: Visual regression and design token gate
tasks.target_raw: Visual regression and design token gate

tasks.title: Production build and compose smoke
acceptance: Frontend build, backend image and compose smoke pass
verification_commands: npm --prefix frontend run build && docker compose build && bash scripts/run-all-tests.sh

tasks.title: Runbooks and README
acceptance: Runbooks cover env, migrations, rollback, MCP allowlist and incident response
verification_commands: grep -R "rollback" README.md docs/runbooks

tasks.title: Final acceptance
acceptance: All journeys verified, tests green, docs up to date and no critical security findings
verification_commands: ./scripts/check-task-dag.sh --strict && ./scripts/check-journey-matrix.sh --strict && ./scripts/check-wiring-contract.sh --strict --require-new-template-columns
